QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_6

question.text: Under the SEBI PFUTP Regulations, it shall be the duty of every person under investigation to:

answer.text: Both produce documents and appear personally before the Investigating Authority
Only appear personally before the authority

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 8.3 and Regulation 8(1), every person under investigation must (a) produce books, accounts and documents and furnish statements, AND (b) appear before the Investigating Authority personally when required. **The Trap:** Some may think only document production is required without personal appearance. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Full cooperation with investigators is essential as non-cooperation itself can attract separate penalties.
